name: Multi-Factor Authentication
body: [{"children": [{"bold": true, "text": "Multi-Factor Authentication"}, {"text": " ("}, {"text": "MFA", "bold": true}, {"text": ") is a security procedure that uses more than one form of authentication to verify a user. It provides an additional security layer beyond a username and password, thus reducing the risk of security breaches."}], "type": "p"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Multi-factor authentication has become a standard practice across various online systems, including Net Banking, iCloud, and business-approved CRMs. The term \u201c"}, {"text": "Multi-Factor", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u201d refers to a multi-step account verification process in which the user is required to provide additional information beyond their usual login credentials."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To log in to their Marketing Cloud accounts, users must first provide their username and password (1st-factor authentication), followed by a verification code sent to their mobile via a security app (2nd-factor authentication)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To summarize, the key benefits of "}, {"text": "Multi-Factor Authentication", "bold": true}, {"text": " ("}, {"text": "MFA", "bold": true}, {"text": ") are as follows:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "MFA protects against common threats, like identity theft."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "MFA lowers the risk of passwords being compromised."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "MFA can help prevent unauthorized individuals from accessing a company\u2019s confidential data."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "MFA strengthens a company\u2019s overall IT cloud security."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How to Log In"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Below are the steps to initiate multi-factor authentication:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1. On the login page, enter your current Marketing Cloud credentials."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/D6OWN0N3B2S2/mfa5.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/D6OWN0N3B2S2/mfa5.png", "name": "mfa5.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 99918, "width": 872, "height": 1302, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 257, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:49:46+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Tip:", "bold": true}, {"text": " To save your session even after you close the browser, select the \u201c"}, {"text": "Remember Me", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u201d checkbox before logging in. Bear in mind that it saves your session only if you have directly logged in through your authenticator apps."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0COJC5DWTUTB/mfa13.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0COJC5DWTUTB/mfa13.png", "name": "mfa13.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 98912, "width": 868, "height": 1294, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 258, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:50:31+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "2. If you wish to log in without an account credential, avail the passkey option by clicking on the \u201c"}, {"text": "Use Passkey", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u201d link. To learn more about this alternative login method, read our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2145-passkey-authentication-for-macos-users", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Passkey Authentication (For macOS Users)", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " and "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2146-passkey-authentication-for-microsoft-windows-users", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Passkey Authentication (For Microsoft Windows Users)", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " articles."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/IDGOQPQB4HNB/mfa6.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/IDGOQPQB4HNB/mfa6.png", "name": "mfa6.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 101660, "width": 872, "height": 1302, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 259, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:50:58+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3. If you are logging in for the first time, you have to perform the following steps:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "a. After inserting your account credentials, you will receive an MFA one-time password (OTP) via SMS or an MS, Authy, or Google Authenticator security app. These OTP screens only appear to you once while you\u2019re logging in for the very first time."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/NVCAPH4AFW9E/mfa8-281-29.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/NVCAPH4AFW9E/mfa8-281-29.png", "name": "mfa8(1).png", "type": "image/png", "size": 539725, "width": 1712, "height": 1125, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 260, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:51:36+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " For SMS-based OTP verification, you can try resending the code three times. After you have exhausted all attempts to resend the code, you will need to restart the login process."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "b. Upon entering a valid MFA OTP, you will be redirected to an MFA setup page where you\u2019ll have to scan the QR code (displayed on the page) through an MS, Authy, or Google Authenticator app (iOS or Android version). To directly scan the QR code from your laptop or PC desktop, utilize the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/authenticator/bhghoamapcdpbohphigoooaddinpkbai", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Authenticator", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " extension from the Chrome Web Store. After scanning the QR code, select Continue to proceed further."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DOMG61NXPOS3/mfa9.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DOMG61NXPOS3/mfa9.png", "name": "mfa9.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 137113, "width": 692, "height": 1262, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 261, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:52:27+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "c. Next, enter a six-digit verification code sent to your mobile (via the security app) and submit the code."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/VJ5ZO06NCVA5/mfa10.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/VJ5ZO06NCVA5/mfa10.png", "name": "mfa10.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 90743, "width": 864, "height": 978, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 262, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:52:54+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "d. A list of backup codes gets generated that can be printed, downloaded, or copied to a secure folder. Use these recovery codes to log in to your account if you cannot access your MS, Authy, or Google Authenticator apps. Click "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": " to finalize the process."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/O92WZKB8S5HQ/mfa11.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/O92WZKB8S5HQ/mfa11.png", "name": "mfa11.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 156585, "width": 684, "height": 1280, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 263, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:53:24+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "You must enable Authenticator app-based MFA since\u00a0SMS-based MFA has been officially discontinued. Once the MFA is configured, the existing Authenticator app or SMS OTP will no longer be needed."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "4. If you have already set up MFA before, you\u2019ll be redirected instead to the OTP page, where you must enter a six-digit OTP sent to your mobile via the MS, Authy, or Google Authenticator app."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SCPCPZKW6HBJ/mfa16.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SCPCPZKW6HBJ/mfa16.png", "name": "mfa16.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 82290, "width": 856, "height": 964, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 264, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:53:52+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Important: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "To ensure your OTP codes are validated by the system at all times, kindly synchronize your device\u2019s timezone with your Maropost account\u2019s default timezone.\n\nAfter you complete the login process, the system will redirect you to the Marketing Cloud\u2019s Dashboard if you own an account or have been added to one."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/C9BFQFVFV26T/authenticate25.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/C9BFQFVFV26T/authenticate25.png", "name": "authenticate25.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 243016, "width": 2880, "height": 1176, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 265, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:54:25+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Important: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "If you aren't linked to an account, you\u2019ll be redirected to the Marketing Cloud\u2019s Identity application after you log in. To gain access to your account, kindly contact your system administrator."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": application."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ALVRE6VK4N8G/authenticate42-281-29.png", "embedData": credentials, access the security section present in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/38-using-maropost-identity-app", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Identity", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ("}, {"type": "link_as_button", "buttonType": "primary", "url": "https://id.maropost.com/", "embedData": {"body": "", "url": "https://id.maropost.com/", "embedType": "link", "name": "Maropost Identity", "faviconUrl": "https://id.maropost.com/images/android-icon-192x192.webp"}, "children": [{"text": "https://id.maropost.com/"}]}, {"text": ") application. Follow the steps shown below to update your existing password:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1. From the Marketing Cloud account, click on your username in the top right corner of the application. Then, click on "}, {"text": "Profile", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/64D4QGDJKTGH/authenticate8.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/64D4QGDJKTGH/authenticate8.png", "name": "authenticate8.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 274665, "width": 2880, "height": 1186, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 268, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:56:32+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "2. You\u2019ll be redirected to the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/38-using-maropost-identity-app", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Identity", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ("}, {"type": "link_as_button", "buttonType": "primary", "url": "https://id.maropost.com/", "embedData": {"body": "", "url": "https://id.maropost.com/", "embedType": "link", "name": "Maropost Identity", "faviconUrl": "https://id.maropost.com/images/android-icon-192x192.webp"}, "children": [{"text": "https://id.maropost.com/"}]}, {"text": ") application. To change your login password, visit the "}, {"text": "Security", "bold": true}, {"text": " section,\u00a0and next to "}, {"text": "My Password", "bold": true}, {"text": ", click on "}, {"text": "Update", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UIF3C123GZ5N/identity5.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UIF3C123GZ5N/identity5.png", "name": "identity5.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 135771, "width": 2880, "height": 872, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 269, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:57:04+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3. Enter your existing password and submit a one-time OTP before adding your new login credentials."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0HBI4O8T7OVC/mfa21-281-29.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0HBI4O8T7OVC/mfa21-281-29.png", "name": "mfa21(1).png", "type": "image/png", "size": 203781, "width": 1874, "height": 972, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 270, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:57:43+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "4. A password reset page will be shown to you. Here, you won\u2019t have to add your current password; instead, mention your new password (complying with the password rules) and re-enter it again. Finally, click on "}, {"text": "Submit", "bold": true}, {"text": " to reset the password."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/U16M05M0WEWA/mfa18.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/U16M05M0WEWA/mfa18.png", "name": "mfa18.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 131694, "width": 878, "height": 1372, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 271, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:58:11+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After submitting the new password, the changes will take effect the next time you log in."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Resetting Your Login Password"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps shown below to reset and generate your new login credentials:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1. If you have forgotten your current password and wish to replace it with a new one, click on the "}, {"text": "Forgot Password", "bold": true}, {"text": " link on the login page."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/IPWVLEOEO40W/mfa25.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/IPWVLEOEO40W/mfa25.png", "name": "mfa25.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 106587, "width": 892, "height": 1316, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 272, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:59:00+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "2. Enter a valid email address registered with your Marketing Cloud account and click on "}, {"text": "Reset Password", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1BS2VV0PXBWU/mfa26.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1BS2VV0PXBWU/mfa26.png", "name": "mfa26.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 76758, "width": 888, "height": 982, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 273, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T09:59:29+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3. A reset password link will be sent to your registered email address. Open the email and click on the link."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1QMQD17N6RKC/authenticate27-281-29.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1QMQD17N6RKC/authenticate27-281-29.png", "name": "authenticate27(1).png", "type": "image/png", "size": 434106, "width": 2064, "height": 894, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 274, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T10:00:06+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "4. Enter your new account password and submit it. Your account gets configured with your new login password."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/PWG6720UKCG8/mfa18.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/PWG6720UKCG8/mfa18.png", "name": "mfa18.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 131694, "width": 878, "height": 1372, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 275, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T10:01:08+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Setting Up a New User's Login Password"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "New users need to undergo the same authentication process as existing Marketing Cloud users, along with the additional steps of account profile and email verification. Below are the steps to set up a new user\u2019s login credentials:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1. After being invited to Maropost, you will receive an invitation email from us. Open the email and click on the "}, {"text": "Setup Profile", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab/link to configure your new account."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/IK5RFD6AED0F/mfa1-281-29.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/IK5RFD6AED0F/mfa1-281-29.png", "name": "mfa1(1).png", "type": "image/png", "size": 474562, "width": 2064, "height": 1128, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 276, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T10:01:55+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "2. Firstly, verify your email with us."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ZX1XE1ZJ0O1L/mfa2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ZX1XE1ZJ0O1L/mfa2.png", "name": "mfa2.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 144505, "width": 876, "height": 1008, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 277, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T10:02:30+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3. Next, an MFA setup page will be shown from which you\u2019ll have to scan the QR code (displayed on the page) through an MS, Authy, or Google Authenticator app (iOS or Android version). After scanning the QR code, select "}, {"text": "Continue", "bold": true}, {"text": " to proceed further."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/QLVXYI753P31/mfa9.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/QLVXYI753P31/mfa9.png", "name": "mfa9.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 137113, "width": 692, "height": 1262, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 278, "dateInserted": "2025-07-25T10:03:04+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "4.
